name: klein-blue
description: Light Swiss-international Editorial video theme with high-grey white surfaces, near-black sans typography, International Klein Blue as the only accent, strict hairlines, square geometry, and calm grid-driven motion.
descriptionZh: 高级灰白底、近黑无衬线、克莱因蓝单一锚点、极细分割线、直角几何和冷静网格秩序，适合科技产品、数据解释、工程方法和发布会式 Editorial 视频。
